title: pterospermadendron suberifolium
intro:
Pterospermadendron suberifolium, also known as the "buried seed tree", is a plant species that produces seeds with a hard, woody outer covering that resembles a small tree root.

Pterospermadendron suberifolium is a plant used in traditional medicine, particularly in China and other parts of Asia, where its seeds are valued for their medicinal properties.

The seeds of the pterospermadendron suberifolium plant are said to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, and are used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory infections. 

Herbal preparations of pterospermadendron suberifolium seeds include infusions and decoctions, which are used to make teas and tonics that are believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving respiratory health.
